items.title: 沖縄本島北部に線状降水帯直前予測 土砂災害などに厳重警戒を
items.description: 梅雨前線の影響で沖縄県には発達した雨雲がかかり続けていて、気象庁は沖縄本島北部では今後3時間以内に線状降水帯が発生する可能性が高まっているとして午後3時半すぎに「線状降水帯直前予測」を発表しました。沖縄県ではこれまでの雨でレベル4土砂災害危険警報が各地に発表されていて、土砂災害や低い土地の浸水などに厳重に警戒してください。

items.description: サッカーワールドカップ北中米大会、優勝を目標に掲げる日本代表が注目の1次リーグ初戦で強豪オランダと対戦し、2対2で引き分けました。後半開始早々に先制された日本はすぐに同点に追いつきましたが、その後、再び勝ち越されました。それでも終盤、日本がコーナーキックから再び追いつきました。記事後半では、森保監督や選手たちのコメントや、試合の詳しい経過もお伝えしています。

items.title: Perfume Packs It In: Documentary Explores the Japanese Group’s 25 Years in “Cold Sleep”
items.description:
After a quarter-century at the top of Japan’s pop-music world, the three women
of Perfume announced their “cold sleep,” a long-term hiatus from show business.
A documentary by the director Sado Taketoshi by the same name explores the
unit’s long years of domestic and global success.

of Perfume announced their “cold sleep,” a long-term hiatus from show business.

unit’s long years of domestic and global success.

items.title: Japanese Researchers Make Breakthrough in Ensuring Farmed Eels Are Female
items.description:
Eel is a popular food in Japan, and farming offers the potential for a more
stable supply. Aquaculture researchers have recently found success toward their
goal of ensuring farmed eels are female, as female eels grow to be much bigger.

kilograms.

items.title: Becoming an Onnagata: Takanosuke Brings the Art of Transformation to Europe
items.description:
With the success of the film Kokuhō drawing global attention to kabuki, rising
star Nakamura Takanosuke recently embarked on his first European tour,
captivating audiences not only with his performances but also with rare,
behind-the-scenes demonstrations of the transformation male actors undergo to
perform female onnagata roles.

ancient Asian technique of slow-preserving fish to a globally popular and
dazzlingly diverse fast food.

polls, but her numbers are slipping as economic and geopolitical conditions
continue to impact the Japanese public.
items.content:

items.title: Blooming and Booming: Japan’s Hydrangeas Enjoy Surge in Popularity
items.description:
Hydrangeas in Japan have become a symbol of the country’s rainy season, blooming
mainly from June to July. Although they were once little loved and considered to
be unlucky, Western appreciation raised their profile, and they have become
hugely popular in recent years.
items.content:
Hydrangeas in Japan have become a symbol of the country’s rainy season, blooming
mainly from June to July. Although they were once little loved and considered to
be unlucky, Western appreciation raised their profile, and they have become
hugely popular in recent years.

items.title: Japan’s World Cup 2026 Preview: Samurai Blue Faces Ongoing Challenges, Hopes for Historic Run
items.description:
Japan’s men’s national soccer team is heading into the 2026 FIFA World Cup
bolstered by victories against powerhouses Brazil last year and England this
year. The Samurai Blue squad has been called the strongest yet, but it will have
to meet the challenges of an injured Mitoma Kaoru and falling team popularity at
home.
items.content:

bolstered by victories against powerhouses Brazil last year and England this
year. The Samurai Blue squad has been called the strongest yet, but it will have
to meet the challenges of an injured Mitoma Kaoru and falling team popularity at

items.title: Konkatsu: Spouse Hunting in Japan
items.description:
The Japanese word konkatsu refers to the active effort of finding a marriage
partner through such means as using dating apps or joining a marriage agency.
items.content:
The Japanese word konkatsu refers to the active effort of finding a marriage
partner through such means as using dating apps or joining a marriage agency.

items.title: Baby Decline: Births in Japan Drop for the Tenth Successive Year
items.description:
There were 670,000 births in Japan in 2025, which is the lowest number since
records began in 1899.
items.content:
There were 670,000 births in Japan in 2025, which is the lowest number since
records began in 1899.

items.title: Good Spouses Hard to Find? Japanese Parents Getting Involved in Matchmaking Events for Children
items.description:
Many Japanese singles are looking for love via konkatsu (spouse-hunting) methods
like dating apps and marriage agencies, but with a low success rate. Now, a
recent trend has seen parents attending matchmaking events on their children’s
behalf.
items.content:
Many Japanese singles are looking for love via konkatsu (spouse-hunting) methods
like dating apps and marriage agencies, but with a low success rate. Now, a
recent trend has seen parents attending matchmaking events on their children’s
behalf.

items.title: Blue-Collar Wages Rising in Japan Amid Labor Shortage
items.description:
Labor shortages in some industries are leading to higher wages for blue-collar
workers in Japan.
items.content:
Labor shortages in some industries are leading to higher wages for blue-collar
workers in Japan.

items.title: Japan’s Bold Moves for Energy Resilience in Asia: POWERR Asia and AZEC 2.0
items.description:
The POWERR Asia and AZEC 2.0 initiatives launched in April by Prime Minister
Takaichi Sanae position Japan as a central pillar of Asia’s energy resilience
and a key driver of the evolving Free and Open Indo-Pacific strategy, as
tensions over the Strait of Hormuz threaten Asia’s energy supply and regional
supply chains.
items.content:
The POWERR Asia and AZEC 2.0 initiatives launched in April by Prime Minister
Takaichi Sanae position Japan as a central pillar of Asia’s energy resilience
and a key driver of the evolving Free and Open Indo-Pacific strategy, as
tensions over the Strait of Hormuz threaten Asia’s energy supply and regional
supply chains.

items.title: Asari: Plump, Umami-Rich Clams Best Enjoyed in Early Summer
items.description:
Tiny clams that play a big role in Japanese cuisine, asari are a plentiful and
popular source of seafood protein in the Japanese diet. A look at the humble
bivalve that plays an outsized role in Japan’s food culture.
items.content:
Tiny clams that play a big role in Japanese cuisine, asari are a plentiful and
popular source of seafood protein in the Japanese diet. A look at the humble
bivalve that plays an outsized role in Japan’s food culture.

items.title: Kōya-Dōfu: A Traditional Preserved Food Bursting with Taste
items.description:
In the years before refrigeration, people discovered that freezing tōfu turned
it into a dry version of the soybean treat that could be preserved safely and
reconstituted in various dishes when it was time to eat it. A look at the ways
kōya-dōfu is enjoyed to this day.
items.content:
In the years before refrigeration, people discovered that freezing tōfu turned
it into a dry version of the soybean treat that could be preserved safely and
reconstituted in various dishes when it was time to eat it. A look at the ways
kōya-dōfu is enjoyed to this day.
